since_last: 67% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.00%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.18% · BTC +2.51% · Gold +1.80% · Nasdaq100 -0.94%. 67% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.00%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.00%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +11.56%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +11.56%, APP +10.75%, META +9.56%, PLTR +8.96%, PATH +8.28%. Laggards: KLAC -10.21%, TER -9.58%, MU -8.67%, LRCX -8.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.13% at $158.67
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
